name: docs-wiki
description: Generic toolkit for creating, organising, editing, validating, and auditing a project Wiki. Adapts to GitHub Wiki sibling repos, in-repo wiki/ folders, GitLab Wiki, and Azure DevOps Wiki. Owns flat-namespace + filename-uniqueness + internal-link conventions, Mermaid diagram authoring rules, broken-link sweeps, code-vs-wiki drift reporting, and a push-approval gate. Does NOT handle wiki-to-memory sync — that is a separate future plugin.
